channel.title: Monetize on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Monetize on Tech Tracker

item.title: How to collect donations directly from telegram group or channel.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-FNvGvJj6za0/Yg0uboiSUwI/AAAAAAAAJMs/2rFGIgbwvT8c4sSC2YQsLb06M90uifMZgCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1645031019788339-0.png" alt=""> Telegram is a popular social messaging platform created by pavel durov and Nikolai durov where millions of channels and groups are managed by content creators, but there is no features available on telegram to monetize and collect donations or offer subscriptions to followers, while YouTube a content streaming platform has required features to monetize content, so Telegram created a official bot named Donate which will help you monetize and collect donations even offer subscriptions directly from Telegram channel or group followers.

item.title: How to Monetize Your Facebook Video With Facebook Ad Breaks In 2021!
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-NZeWmOVBmlc/YFi_9zN1PZI/AAAAAAAADzg/j4umwaeY8mcWh704RxJCAgv0HNyLnrHEgCLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1616429043694931-0.png" alt="How to Monetize Your Facebook Video With Facebook Ad Breaks In 2021!" title="How to Monetize Your Facebook Video With Facebook Ad Breaks In 2021!"> Do you own a facebook page? and do you like to monetize it? You can monetize your facebook page but only the videos of them yes, facebook only allows you to monetize the videos that were available on facebook pages with their in-stream ads provided by Facebook creators.

item.title: 5 Best Ad Networks For Your Website - 2020
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-W4bP7Cxc-wg/XoIeUoXfGfI/AAAAAAAABTU/DImUbSigKX042HM37RQUsUWh64XNhM2ogCLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/IMG_20200111_105332_780-02-25.jpeg" alt=""> If you are looking for some best ad networks for either publishers or advertisers we list you the 5 best ad networks here **- 5 Best Ad - Networks - ** **• AdSense.com • ** Yes, AdSense is no - 1 priority that top the list the AdSense by google is global leader for publishers and advertisers and the you not going to find the site that can give high impression rate for user.
